items.title: Tiny voice stack for microcontrollers
items.oneliner: Runs VAD, speech recognition, and TTS in under 500 KB RAM on RP2350-class boards.

items.title: Terminal casting for web video
items.oneliner: CLI tool streams browser video directly to Smart TVs without Chromecast, AirPlay, or screen mirroring lag.

items.title: Self-hosted iOS analytics with Umami
items.oneliner: Swift package sends queued app events to Umami, giving privacy-friendly mobile analytics without heavyweight SDKs.

items.title: Searchable encrypted fields on Supabase
items.oneliner: CipherStash adds field-level encryption with searchable queries, so teams can lock down PII without losing SQL usability.

items.title: Triton backend for Alibaba SAIL
items.oneliner: Fork lets you write Python Triton kernels for T-Head PPUs with async data movement and pipelined execution.

items.title: Single-binary self-hosted Git forge
items.oneliner: GitRoot runs a lightweight forge from one binary, storing everything in git and extending features through plugins.

items.title: Community language with active source
items.oneliner: Gleam provides a type-safe language, compiler, and language server for building reliable systems without corporate lock-in.

items.title: Open source RSS social foundation
items.oneliner: rss.chat gives developers an MIT-licensed base for building small social networks around RSS feeds and OPML.

items.title: Cross-platform C plus plus transcription library
items.oneliner: Transcribe.cpp packages tested speech-to-text models with streaming and batch APIs for desktop transcription apps.

items.title: Database isolation levels explained clearly
items.oneliner: Hands-on note compares Repeatable Read and Snapshot Isolation across PostgreSQL and MySQL, including write skew pitfalls.
